popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Sire de Courci (Coucy) and Marle.  Adherent of Philip Augustus; Crusader; fell 1191, at Acre, on the 3rd Crusade.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/CHAMPAGNE%20NOBILITY.htm#EnguerrandIICo …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul Ier de Coucy於1134年10月15日出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆波福斯時，他的父親Enguerrand de Coucy25歲，母親Agnès de Beaugency26歲。他於1160年與Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut在比利時海瑙特蒙斯結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1191年11月1日在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年57歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯拉 布泰爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raoul Ier de Coucy于1134年10月15日出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆波福斯时，他的父亲Enguerrand de Coucy25岁，母亲Agnès de Beaugency26岁。他于1160年与Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut在比利时海瑙特蒙斯结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1191年11月1日在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年57岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯拉 布泰爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul Ier de Coucy was born on 15 October 1134, in Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Enguerrand de Coucy, was 25 and his mother, Agnès de Beaugency, was 26. He married Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut in 1160, in Mons, Hainaut, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 1 November 1191, in Jerusalem, Palestine, at the age of 57, and was buried in La Bouteille, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul Ier de Coucy est né le 15 octobre 1134, à Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Enguerrand de Coucy, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Beaugency, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut en 1160, à Mons, Hainaut, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 1 novembre 1191, à Jerusalem, Palestine, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à La Bouteille, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul Ier de Coucy am 15. Oktober 1134 in Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Enguerrand de Coucy 25 und seine Mutter Agnès de Beaugency 26. Er hat 1160 in Mons, Hennegau, Belgien Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. November 1191 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Jerusalem, Palästina und wurde in La Bouteille, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul Ier de Coucy è nato il il 15 ottobre 1134 nel Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Enguerrand de Coucy, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Beaugency, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut nel 1160, nel Mons, Hainaut, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 1 novembre 1191, nel Jerusalem, Palestina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a La Bouteille, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul Ier de Coucyが1134年10月15日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメボベスで生まれた時，父Enguerrand de Coucyは25歳，母Agnès de Beaugencyは26歳であった。1160年にベルギーヘイナトモンスでAgnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1191年11月1日にパレスチナジャーウサレムで57歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンラ ボウテイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul Ier de Coucy(이)가 1134년 10월 15일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 보브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Enguerrand de Coucy(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Beaugency(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1160년 벨기에 하인오트 몬스에서 Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1191년 11월 1일 팔레스타인 제루사렘에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 라 부테이에 묻혔다.

mn.15 OCT 1134–1 November 1191: 1134 оны Аравдугаар сарын 15–1191 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 1

pt.15 OCT 1134–1 November 1191: 15 de outubro de 1134–1 de novembro de 1191
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul Ier de Coucy nasceu em 15 de outubro de 1134, em Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Enguerrand de Coucy, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Beaugency, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut em 1160, em Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1191, em Jerusalem, Palestina, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em La Bouteille, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul Ier de Coucy родился 15 октября 1134 г. в местности бовесь, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Enguerrand de Coucy было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Beaugency, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut в 1160 г. в местности монс, ханаут, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 1 ноября 1191 г. в местности джирсеилем, Палестина в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности ла боутилл, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.15 OCT 1134–1 November 1191: 15 de octubre de 1134–1 de noviembre de 1191
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul Ier de Coucy nació el 15 de octubre de 1134, en Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Enguerrand de Coucy, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnès de Beaugency, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut en 1160, en Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1191, en Jerusalem, Palestina, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en La Bouteille, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
